name: ab-test-framework
description: 轻量级端侧A/B测试架构框架

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:admin && npm run build:client
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
